title: Adding Two Groups of Objects

sentences.text: Look at these two groups of colorful blocks on the screen!
Can you guess how many blocks there are in total?
Let's count the blocks in each group. The first group has five blocks.
Now, the second group has five blocks too. Let's add them together.
How many blocks do we have now? Let's count them all together!
One, two, three, four, five, six, seven, eight, nine, ten!
Great job! We found that five plus five equals ten blocks total.
Keep practicing by adding other groups of objects at home!

teacherNotes: Encourage students to explore adding different groups of objects in hands-on activities.
